title: Coloradans Against Fourteeners
headline: Tired of the Altitude Attitude?
caption:
Join the resistance. Because climbing mountains is overrated and bragging about it is worse. Get your 'Coloradans Against Fourteeners' tee and let the air be thin where it belongs. 👉 https://www.etsy.com/listing/878823536/coloradans-against-fourteeners-t-shirt Tell us if the reference lands.

#ColoradansAgainst #Fourteeners
alt_text: A gray t-shirt with 'Coloradans Against Fourteeners' printed on it.
